description: Write a new AGENTS.md at the repo root that explains to a curious tool what beadwork is. Should cover: what it is (git-native issue tracker for AI agent workflows), why it exists (durability across context loss/compaction/session boundaries), repo structure (Go CLI in cmd/bw/, prompt templates in prompts/), how it's used in other projects (bw onboard injects the snippet from prompts/agents.md). Keep it concise — a tool should be able to read this and understand the project quickly.
title: Write new root AGENTS.md describing the beadwork project
